tasks.name: Rework onboarding flow
tasks.prompt: Split the onboarding wizard into focused steps and persist progress.

tasks.name: Add activity feed to dashboard
tasks.prompt: Stream recent events into a live activity feed on the dashboard.

tasks.name: Polish invitation email template
tasks.prompt: Tighten copy and add a clear CTA to the invitation email.

tasks.name: Refine CTA button hover states
tasks.prompt: Child task of invitation polish — align hover states with the design tokens.

tasks.name: Wire settings sync across windows
tasks.prompt: Propagate user settings updates to all open tabs and windows.

tasks.name: Ship keyboard shortcuts cheatsheet
tasks.prompt: Press ? to open an overlay listing all keyboard shortcuts.

tasks.name: Fix table flicker on column resize
tasks.prompt: Column resize causes a one-frame reflow in the data grid.

tasks.name: Speed up initial workspace scan
tasks.prompt: Parallelize workspace indexing on first load.

tasks.name: Harden session auth middleware
tasks.prompt: Rotate session tokens on privilege change and scope them per origin.

tasks.name: Make charts opt-in via feature flag
tasks.prompt: Hide the experimental charts panel behind a feature flag.

tasks.name: Bulk row actions
tasks.prompt: Shift-click to select ranges, Cmd-click to toggle.

tasks.name: Add CSV export to the reports page
tasks.prompt: Export current report view as CSV with applied filters.

hooks.description: Launch Claude Code with the task prompt

onboardingPlanMarkdown:
# Rework onboarding flow

## Outcome

Split the existing single-page onboarding into a three-step stepper that persists progress per-user. Users should be able to close the tab mid-flow and pick up exactly where they left off.

## Starting point

The current `<Onboarding />` component renders everything in one scroll. State lives in a local `useState` tuple and evaporates on reload. Designers already provided the stepper mocks in Figma (`Onboarding / v2`).

## Steps

1. Extract each section into its own screen component under `src/onboarding/steps/`.
2. Add a `useOnboardingProgress` hook that reads + writes `{ step, payload }` to `localStorage` under `onboarding:<userId>`.
3. Wire a header-level `<Stepper />` that reflects current step and supports back/next.
4. Replace the welcome copy block with a reusable `<WelcomeIntro />` component so the marketing site can embed it.
5. Add analytics events (`onboarding_step_viewed`, `onboarding_step_completed`) at each boundary.

## Out of scope

- Server-side persistence (we can add this later once the event shape is firm).
- Redesigning the terminal screen — it stays exactly as-is.

## Test plan

- Unit tests for `useOnboardingProgress` (initial read, write, clear on completion).
- RTL tests for the stepper navigation (next, back, direct link to a completed step).
- Manual: interrupt mid-flow, reload, confirm you land on the same step with the right payload.
